name: Pork Chops Vermont
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except the pork chops.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake the pork chops for 30 minutes.
5. Pour the sauce over the pork chops.
6. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, spooning sauce over the chops every 5 minutes.
